plotting

library(tidyverse)
── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.5
✔ forcats   1.0.0     ✔ stringr   1.5.1
✔ ggplot2   3.5.1     ✔ tibble    3.2.1
✔ lubridate 1.9.3     ✔ tidyr     1.3.1
✔ purrr     1.0.4     
── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
transects <- read_csv("all_measurements_long.csv")
Rows: 2388 Columns: 4
── Column specification ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Delimiter: ","
chr (1): name
dbl (3): Transect, Measurement_Point, value

ℹ Use `spec()` to retrieve the full column specification for this data.
ℹ Specify the column types or set `show_col_types = FALSE` to quiet this message.
transects <- transects |> 
  mutate(measured = case_when(
    name == "F2021" ~ "t1",
    name == "S2022" ~ "t2",
    name == "F2024" ~ "t3",
    name == "S2025" ~ "t4"
  )) |>
  mutate(period = case_when(
    name == "F2021" ~ "p1",
    name == "S2022" ~ "p1",
    name == "F2024" ~ "p2",
    name == "S2025" ~ "p2"
  ))
  

transects |>
  filter(Transect <= 12) |>
ggplot(aes(x = Measurement_Point, 
                      y = value,
                      color = measured,
                      linetype = period))+
  geom_line()+
  facet_wrap(facets = "Transect",scales = "free" )+
  theme_classic()
Warning: Removed 105 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
(`geom_line()`).
transects |>
  filter(Transect > 12 & Transect <= 24 ) |>
ggplot(aes(x = Measurement_Point, 
                      y = value,
                      color = measured,
                      linetype = period))+
  geom_line()+
  facet_wrap(facets = "Transect",scales = "free" )+
  theme_classic()

(`geom_line()`).
